title: error-code namespace reservation
manager: Error codes become public API the instant the first one ships — users grep for them, tools branch on them — so reserving the numbering scheme now costs an afternoon while retrofitting it later costs a whole edition. 6.0 reserves the `FSL####` ranges by phase and maps the error kinds that already exist onto them, so the `explain` verb and everything downstream read from a stable table instead of ad-hoc strings.
cs: `FSL####` ranges partitioned by phase (parse/compile/runtime/check/cli); ReplayError/ConfigError/CodegenError kinds get numbers; the `explain` skeleton reads the table; filed via projection B6.
